title: fix deprecation of clear_objs_and_retain_memory
body: The API of diffusers `clear_objs_and_retain_memory` has been deprecated in [huggingface/diffusers#9543](https://github.com/huggingface/diffusers/pull/9543/files#diff-5c07adf115dbb937f26dbfedff2aef0d31b4e8e3a58ba9cfb4a0c9f64672a8c5L263) and is replaced with `free_memory`. Therefore, the corresponding parts in the LoRA training script need to be adjusted to adapt to the latest version of diffusers.

step_plan.summary: Replace deprecated diffusers.training_utils.clear_objs_and_retain_memory with the new free_memory API while preserving backward compatibility by importing free_memory with a fallback alias and updating the validation call site in log_validation.

steps.operation: Update module-level import to provide a backward-compatible alias for diffusers.free_memory
steps.reason: diffusers.training_utils.clear_objs_and_retain_memory has been deprecated and replaced with free_memory. Replace the direct import with a try/except that prefers free_memory and falls back to importing clear_objs_and_retain_memory as free_memory to preserve compatibility with older diffusers releases. Also preserve other existing imports from diffusers.training_utils (e.g., cast_training_params).
steps.side_effects: Low risk change: avoids ImportError on newer diffusers and keeps support for older versions. Tests: run unit/smoke tests that import the training script to ensure no import-time exceptions. Dependents: any code in this script (and other modules, if any) that expects clear_objs_and_retain_memory will now use the compatibility alias free_memory; external projects importing this script shouldn't see an API change. API impacts: none on the script's public behavior, but it avoids breaking when running with newer diffusers where clear_objs_and_retain_memory no longer exists.

steps.operation: Replace deprecated call in validation routine to use the compatibility alias free_memory
steps.reason: log_validation currently calls clear_objs_and_retain_memory([pipe]) which is deprecated/removed in recent diffusers; change the call to free_memory([pipe]) (the imported compatibility alias) so the script runs with both old and new diffusers versions.
steps.side_effects: Low risk: semantics preserved if free_memory accepts the same argument type (a list of objects). Tests: run the validation path (or a minimal smoke test that constructs a pipe and calls log_validation) to confirm no runtime errors and that memory is freed as expected. Dependents: only affects memory-cleanup behavior in validation; ensure no other call sites to the old name exist. API impacts: none beyond removing use of the deprecated API; if free_memory's signature differs in future versions, additional adaptation may be needed.
